info.title: GymPro Backend API
info.description:
Backend API for single-gym member management, income/expense tracking, and content delivery.

## Response envelope
All endpoints return `{ success, message?, data?, errors? }`.

## Authentication
- **Dashboard (owner):** `POST /api/auth/owner/login` → use `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected routes.
- **Mobile (member):** `POST /api/auth/member/login` by phone.

## Public routes (no token)
- `POST /api/members` — member registration
- `GET /api/plans`, `GET /api/plans/{id}` — plan listing
- `GET /api/services`, `GET /api/services/{id}` — service listing
- `GET /api/content`, `GET /api/content/daily-quote`, `GET /api/content/{id}` — content
- `POST /api/auth/owner/login`, `POST /api/auth/member/login`

bearerAuth.description: Step 1: Call POST /api/auth/owner/login. Step 2: Copy only the token value from data.token. Step 3: Click Authorize and paste the token (do NOT type 'Bearer').

errors.description: Zod validation errors or extra context

200.description: Monthly report with income, expenses, and net profit

post.summary: Manually add a payment for an active member

get.summary: Get a scheduled notification by ID
List pending members awaiting payment confirmation

patch.summary: Confirm payment and activate a pending member
